adds_denominators_directly.skill: Finding a common denominator before adding fractions
adds_denominators_directly.reason: Check whether the difficulty is finding a common denominator before the addition itself, with short questions on a single common denominator only.

wrong_lcm.reason: Run pairs of small denominators and ask to identify the least common denominator before combining.

ignores_denominator.reason: Strengthen the link between numerator and denominator before combining two fractions.

concept_gap.skill: Understanding a fraction as a ratio
concept_gap.reason: Show a visual representation of the fraction as a ratio before the addition algorithm.

operation_confusion.skill: Distinguishing addition from multiplication of fractions
operation_confusion.reason: Explicitly choose one operation (add/subtract/multiply) with a short guiding sentence.

tense_confusion.skill: Matching tense to a time word or subject
tense_confusion.reason: Choose minimal pairs (e.g. past/present) with the same root and a clear time word.

grammar_pattern_error.skill: Matching verb form to the subject
grammar_pattern_error.reason: Isolate short sentences with singular/plural subjects and matching verb forms.

vocabulary_gap.reason: Complete a word in a short sentence with clear context (not a standalone word list).

comprehension_gap.skill: A focused comprehension question on a short paragraph
comprehension_gap.reason: Read a short paragraph and answer one question that requires explicit information from the text.

detail_recall_error.skill: Locating an explicit detail in the text
detail_recall_error.reason: Ask to locate one detail that appeared explicitly, without inferences.

inference_error.reason: A short sentence with a question that requires one inference step grounded in the text.

sequence_error.reason: Present three events and ask for a sensible order based on the wording.

concept_confusion.reason: Present two adjacent concepts and choose one correct definition from the shortened text.

fact_recall_gap.skill: Recalling a fact from the lesson
fact_recall_gap.reason: A short question with one tight answer from the material learned.

cause_effect_gap.reason: Choose what comes from the cause and what from the effect in a simple situation.

classification_error.reason: Present a small set and ask to classify by one clear attribute.

place_value_error.reason: Isolate the place value of one digit in a number in a short exercise.

multiplication_fact_gap.reason: A short direct multiplication question from the multiplication table.

geometry_calculation_slip.skill: Choosing a formula or first step in geometry
geometry_calculation_slip.reason: Choose an appropriate formula or first step before numerical calculation.

prerequisite_gap.reason: Reinforce a foundational concept before continuing.

spelling_pattern_error.reason: Complete a word in a sentence with clear context.

present_simple_3rd_singular_error.skill: Third-person verb form in the simple present
present_simple_3rd_singular_error.reason: Isolate short sentences with he/she/it and choose the matching verb form.

past_tense_form_error.reason: Choose minimal past/present pairs with the same root.

progressive_aspect_error.reason: Check the choice between a continuous action and a simple tense.

question_word_order_error.reason: Isolate short question sentences with do/does/is/are in the right place.

modal_verb_error.reason: Choose between two helping verbs in a short sentence with the same main verb.

quantifier_choice_error.reason: Distinguish countable vs. uncountable quantity in a short sentence.

comparative_form_error.reason: Choose -er/-est or more/most in a short sentence.

future_form_error.reason: Choose between will and going to in a clear context.

perfect_aspect_error.reason: Check a perfect form against a simple tense in the same context.

conditional_clause_error.reason: Isolate if/when with a matching verb form in one person.

sentence_structure_error.reason: Isolate short sentences with consistent word order and verb form.

advanced_grammar_error.reason: Isolate one sentence with a clear grammar pattern to check.

place_identification_error.reason: A short question about location or settlement type from the material.

math_frac_same_den.skill: Adding/subtracting fractions with the same denominator
math_frac_same_den.reason: Confirm stability in the numerator when the denominator is already shared.

math_frac_common_denominator.skill: Finding a common denominator before adding
math_frac_common_denominator.reason: First check the common-denominator step without skipping straight to the final answer.

en_grammar_be_present.reason: Isolate sentences with I/he/they and choose the matching be form.

en_grammar_present_simple.reason: Isolate short sentences with he/she/it and choose the matching verb form.

en_grammar_past_simple.reason: Choose minimal past/present pairs with the same root.

en_grammar_progressive.reason: Check the choice between a continuous action and a simple tense.

en_grammar_question_frames.reason: Isolate short question sentences with do/does/is/are in the right place.

en_grammar_modals.reason: Choose between two helping verbs in a short sentence.

en_grammar_quantifiers.reason: Distinguish some/many/much in a short sentence.

en_grammar_comparatives.reason: Choose a comparison form in a short sentence.

en_grammar_future_forms.reason: Choose between will and going to in a clear context.

en_grammar_complex_tenses.reason: Check perfect vs. a simple tense in the same context.

en_grammar_conditionals.reason: Isolate if/when with a matching verb form.

en_grammar_phase29_standard.skill: Matching verb form to the subject
en_grammar_phase29_standard.reason: Isolate short sentences with singular/plural subjects and matching verb forms.

en_grammar_phase29_advanced.reason: Isolate one sentence with a clear grammar pattern to check.

he_comp_explicit_detail.skill: Retrieving an explicit detail from a short text
he_comp_explicit_detail.reason: A short paragraph and a question that points to a specific sentence.

sci_body_fact_recall.reason: One tight fact question from the material about the organ or system.

sci_respiration_concept.skill: Role of the respiratory system in gas exchange
sci_respiration_concept.reason: Distinguish blood transport from oxygen/CO2 exchange with the air.

moledet_geo_homeland.reason: A short fact question about Israel/settlements.

moledet_geo_community.reason: A short question about community life from the material.

moledet_geo_citizenship.reason: Distinguish two civics concepts in a short sentence.

moledet_geo_values.reason: A short question about a value or tradition from the lesson.

moledet_geo_maps.reason: A short map question with a clear scale or direction.
